hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{try{const cmd=((JSON.parse(d).tool_input)||{}).command||'';if(/\bgit\s+push\b[^|;&]*\b(?:origin\s+)?(?:main|master)\b/.test(cmd)){console.error('Bloqueado: push direto pra main/master proibido neste projeto. Abra um PR.');process.exit(2);}}catch(e){}});"
